svg.title: Case 2, penalty shootout with the team watching from halfway
svg.desc: Left half: Ronaldo takes a penalty alone and scores into the top corner past the keeper. Right half: the team's designated kicker steps up and takes a penalty that the keeper saves, while the other 10 U19 teammates stand on the halfway line unable to help.
svg.text: The team is still there — but the framework goes quiet at the spot

g.text: Teammates watch from halfway — can't help

svg.text: Raw capability wins the single shot
Framework adds nothing at the spot
